name: Piquant Meatloaf with Mushroom Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the ground beef with salt, pepper, paprika, oregano, thyme, garlic powder, chili powder, and parsley flakes.
2. Mix the seasoned meat well.
3. In a bowl, combine evaporated milk and egg. Stir in cracker crumbs and let soak for 5 minutes.
4. Add the soaked mixture to the ground beef and onions, mixing thoroughly.
5. Place the loaf in a greased baking dish and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1-1/4 hours.
6. In another pan, sauté mushrooms and onions in butter until tender.
7. Mix flour with salt and paprika, then blend into the mushroom mixture.
8. Stir in broth and cream, cooking until thickened and bubbly.
9. Serve the gravy over sliced meatloaf.
